content:
<@427491045308235776> <@774033563732541451> Just to be clear here though, if it seems like I am pushing back to not pre-validate witness, i am not. This is just a discussion not an argument. 

We are focussing on the best performance with complete correctness. My focus is solving this witness spoofing issue without losing too much ground. Do let me know if it felt otherwise 🙂
